py_theme_1: Naye aarambh — ek 9-saal ka chakra shuru hota hai. Apne sapnon ke beej boya karo.
py_theme_2: Saajhedaari aur dhairya. Rishte gahre ho kar phoolenge.
py_theme_3: Rachnatmakta, khushi, aur abhivyakti — apni andar ki roshni tez chamakne do.
py_theme_4: Mehnat aur buniyad banana. Anushasan tumhara sabse bada asset hai.
py_theme_5: Badlav, azaadi, aur yatra. Anapekshit ko khule dil se apnao.
py_theme_6: Parivaar, pyaar, aur zimmedaari. Khud ko aur apne aas-paas walon ko posho.
py_theme_7: Chintan, adhyatmikta, aur antar karya. Andar ki gehra sachai talasho.
py_theme_8: Shakti, mahatvaakansha, aur vitt. Tumhari koshishon ka fal aayega.
py_theme_9: Samapan aur mukti. Purane adhyayon ko band karo; ek naya chakra aane wala hai.
py_theme_11: Adhyatmik jagran. Divya margdarshan bol raha hai — kya tum sun rahe ho?
py_theme_22: Manifestation ka master saal. Bade socho. Kuchh mahaan banao.
py_theme_33: Gehra prem aur shikshan ka saal. Apna poora dil se manavta ki seva karo.
tara_janma_desc: Karmic pahchaan — janm kundali ki buniyad
tara_sadhana_desc: Mehnat rang laati hai, anushasan ka inaam
tara_naidhana_desc: Bahut hanikarak — saavdhani se aage badhein
tara_paramamitra_desc: Ati shubh — sarvottam bhala karne wala
karaka_AK_desc: Aatma, jeevan ka uddeshya, antarik swarup
room_main-door_idealDir: North, East ya North-East (Ishan) — sabse achha disha
room_main-door_importance: Main door positive energy aur samriddhi ka pravesh sthal hota hai. Iski disha poore ghar ka sabse mahatvapurn Vastu tatva hoti hai.
room_main-door_dos_0: North-East (Ishan) ya North main door ke liye sabse achhi disha hai
room_main-door_dos_1: Majboot, bhaari lakdi ka darwaza istemal karein
room_main-door_dos_2: Pravesh par Swastik ya Om ka nishan lagayen
room_main-door_dos_3: Darwaza andar ki taraf khulna chahiye
room_main-door_dos_4: Nameplate saaf aur clearly dikhai dene wali rakhen
room_main-door_dos_5: Hamesha pravesh ko achhi roshni mein rakhen
room_main-door_donts_0: Koi khambha seedha main door ke samne na khada ho
room_main-door_donts_1: Main door ko South ya South-West mein na rakhen
room_main-door_donts_2: Main door ke bahar jooton ya chappalon ka dher na rakhen
room_main-door_donts_3: Darwaza chidh-chidhana ya tuta hua na chhoden — turant marammat karen
room_main-door_donts_4: Bathroom seedha main entrance ki taraf na ho
room_main-door_remedies_0: Ashirwad ke liye darwaze par 'Shri' ya Ganpati ka nishan lagayen
room_main-door_remedies_1: Prati subah pravesh par rangoli ya taazi phool rakhen
room_main-door_remedies_2: Ghar mein pravesh karte waqt 'Om Namah Shivaya' ka jaap karein
room_living_idealDir: Ghar ka North ya East wing
room_living_importance: Living room ghar mein samajik urja ka kendra hota hai. Mehmaan yahin aate hain aur parivaar yahin ikattha hota hai.
room_living_dos_0: Sofe aur furniture ko NW ya SW kone mein rakhen
room_living_dos_1: TV ya entertainment unit East ya North wall ki taraf hona chahiye
room_living_dos_2: Subah ki laabhdayak dhoop East-facing khidkiyon se ane dein
room_living_dos_3: Halki rangon ka istemal karein — safed, cream, ya halka peela
room_living_dos_4: Ghadi ko North ya East wall par latkayein
room_living_donts_0: Sofa ko seedha main door ke samne na rakhen
room_living_donts_1: Kaale ya gahre laal jaise andhere rangon se bachen
room_living_donts_2: Tuta ya kharab furniture turant hata dein
room_living_donts_3: Darwaze ke nazdeek kone mein aaine na rakhen
room_living_remedies_0: North-East konar ek crystal ball rakho taaki positivity badhe
room_living_remedies_1: North wall par ek Laughing Buddha rakho dhan ke liye
room_living_remedies_2: NE ya East konar mein taaze phool ya paudhe rakho
room_kitchen_importance: Rasoi aag tattva (Agni) ka sthan hai. Iski sthiti parivaar ki sehat, dhan aur samanjasya ko gahra prabhavit karti hai.
room_kitchen_dos_0: Rasoi ke liye South-East (SE) konar sabse achha hai
room_kitchen_dos_1: Banaane wala jab pakaye to mukh East ki aur hona chahiye
room_kitchen_dos_2: Paani ka srot (sink) rasoi ke North-East konar mein rakho
room_kitchen_dos_3: Tez, garam rang istemal karo — peela, narangi, ya halka laal
room_kitchen_dos_4: Rasoi ko saaf aur achhi hawa daar rakho
room_kitchen_donts_0: Rasoi North-East mein na rakho — isse paani- aag ka santulan bigadta hai
room_kitchen_donts_1: Pakte waqt rasoighar ko South ki taraf muh karke nahi khana chahiye
room_kitchen_donts_2: Gas stove aur sink ko bilkul saath mein na rakho
room_kitchen_donts_3: Bathroom seedha rasoi ke bagal mein na ho
room_kitchen_remedies_0: South-East konar mein chhota Agni Dev murti rakho
room_kitchen_remedies_1: Roj pakane se pehle ghee ka diya jalao
room_kitchen_remedies_2: Rasoi ki diwar par tamba ka Swastik latkao
room_master-bedroom_idealDir: South-West (SW) — parivaar ke mukhiya ke liye
room_master-bedroom_importance: Master bedroom aaram aur glyapan ka sthan hai. Iski disha seedha sehat, neend aur shaadi ke rishton ko prabhavit karti hai.
room_master-bedroom_dos_0: Master bedroom South-West (SW) mein sabse achha hota hai
room_master-bedroom_dos_1: Sote waqt sir ko South ya East ki ore rakhna chahiye
room_master-bedroom_dos_2: Majboot lakdi ke bistar istemal karo — metal frames se bacho
room_master-bedroom_dos_3: Sukoon dene wale rang use karo — halka neela, hara, ya gulabi
room_master-bedroom_dos_4: Bhaari furniture SW konar mein rakho
room_master-bedroom_donts_0: Bistar ke saamne mirror na rakho — ye neend ko disturb karta hai
room_master-bedroom_donts_1: Sote waqt sir ko North ki aur na rakhna
room_master-bedroom_donts_2: Bistar ke paas electronic devices na rakho
room_master-bedroom_donts_3: Bedroom mein paani store na karo
room_master-bedroom_remedies_0: Pyar ke liye SW konar mein ek jodi Mandarin ducks rakho
room_master-bedroom_remedies_1: Bistar ke table par ek rose quartz crystal rakho
room_master-bedroom_remedies_2: Safed ya halka gulabi bedsheets istemal karo
room_children_importance: Bachon ka kamra unke vikas, padhai aur rachnatmakta ko gadhata hai. Iski disha unki dhyaan kendrit karne ki kshamta aur atmavishwas ko prabhavit karti hai.
room_children_dos_0: Bachon ke kamre ke liye West ya NW sabse achha hai
room_children_dos_1: Study table East ya North ki ore honi chahiye
room_children_dos_2: Halka, jivit rang istemal karo — hara, neela, ya peela
room_children_dos_3: Study table par chhota Saraswati murti rakho
room_children_dos_4: Bookshelf East ya North diwar par rakho
room_children_donts_0: Bistar ko beam ke neeche na rakho
room_children_donts_1: Teekhe kone aur nukile aayudh se bacho
room_children_donts_2: Bistar ke bilkul saamne TV ya computer na rakho
room_children_remedies_0: Kamre ke East konar mein ek hara paudha rakho
room_children_remedies_1: North diwar par shiksha sambandhi chart ya motivational poster latkao
room_children_remedies_2: Sakaratmak urja bulane ke liye chhota wind chime lagao
room_pooja_importance: Pooja ka kamra ghar ka adhyatmik kendra hai. Iski disha ishwar aur parivaar ki bhalai ke beech link banati hai.
room_pooja_dos_0: Pooja ke liye North-East (Ishan) sabse achha sthan hai
room_pooja_dos_1: Prarthana karte waqt East ya North ki ore mukh rakho
room_pooja_dos_2: Safed, cream, ya halka peela rang use karo
room_pooja_dos_3: Murtiyan diwar se kam se kam 1 inch door honi chahiye
room_pooja_donts_0: Pooja kamra sone ke kamre mein na banayein
room_pooja_donts_1: Bathroom ya toilet bagal mein nahi hona chahiye
room_pooja_donts_2: Tute hue murti ya phate hue tasveer na rakhein
room_pooja_donts_3: Murtiyon ko ek dusre ka samna karte hue na rakhein
room_pooja_remedies_0: Purab ki deewar par 'Om' ka nishaan latkayein
room_pooja_remedies_1: Roz taji phool aur dhup rakhein
room_bathroom_importance: Bathroom kachra nikalne ki jagah hota hai. Iski disha negative urja aur beemari se bachav karti hai.
room_bathroom_dos_0: Bathroom ke liye North-West ya West behtar hai
room_bathroom_dos_1: Toilet seat North-South ki taraf hona chahiye
room_bathroom_dos_2: Bathroom ka darwaza hamesha band rakhein
room_bathroom_dos_3: Halki neeli ya safed tiles ka istemal karein
room_bathroom_dos_4: Exhaust aur hawa aane ka intezam zaroori karein
room_bathroom_donts_0: Bathroom North-East mein na banayein — yeh sampatti kharab karta hai
room_bathroom_donts_1: Bathroom ghar ke beech (Brahmasthan) mein nahi hona chahiye
room_bathroom_donts_2: Bathroom ka darwaza kitchen ya pooja room ki taraf nahi hona chahiye
room_bathroom_donts_3: Pani leak na hone dein — turant repair karein
room_bathroom_remedies_0: Bathroom ke kone mein sea-salt ka bartan rakhein
room_bathroom_remedies_1: Safai ke liye camphor ya essential oils ka istemal karein
room_bathroom_remedies_2: Bathroom ke darwaze par Vastu Pyramid latkayein
room_study_idealDir: East ya North — Saraswati ki disha
room_study_importance: Study room career, shiksha aur concentration ko shape karta hai. Iski disha dimaag ki focus aur buddhi ko badhati hai.
room_study_dos_0: Study room ke liye East ya North behtar hai
room_study_dos_1: Padhte waqt East ya North ki taraf mukh karein
room_study_dos_2: Halki, taza rang — green ya light blue istemal karein
room_study_dos_3: Bookshelf East ya North wali deewar par hona chahiye
room_study_dos_4: Study table par ek chhota lamp rakhein
room_study_donts_0: Study table ko seedha beam ke neeche na rakhein
room_study_donts_1: Teekhe kone study ke saamne na honi chahiye
room_study_donts_2: Study table ke saamne aaine na rakhein
room_study_donts_3: Gandagi aur anavashyak kagaz se bachen
room_study_remedies_0: Study table par Saraswati ki murti rakhein
room_study_remedies_1: North-East kone mein ek chhota paudha rakhein
room_study_remedies_2: Spashtata ke liye table par crystal globe rakhein
